source_identity.title: Effects of Learning Skills Interventions on Student Learning: A Meta-Analysis
source_identity.authors: John Hattie; John Biggs; Nola Purdie
source_identity.apa_reference: Hattie, J., Biggs, J., & Purdie, N. (1996). Effects of learning skills interventions on student learning: A meta-analysis. Review of Educational Research, 66(2), 99-136. https://doi.org/10.3102/00346543066002099

retrieval_preferences.citation_policy: Use ARA/API for retrieval and synthesis; reopen raw PDF or high-quality Markdown/TEI for exact quotes, statistics, page numbers, and final bibliographic details.
